Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mount Samara]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Mount Samara contains a heavenly guardian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Mount Samara is the tallest of the four holy peaks and is located to the east.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Mount Samara is blanketed in snow and has a ring of pale white light around its summit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon and Yerin are flying over the terrain of Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon and Yerin traveled down the slopes of Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Anses is on the peak of Mount Samara.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Mount Samara is a mountain located near the hills where Lindon and Yerin are camping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — The characters are traveling through a forest after descending from Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Mount Samara has slopes where Sandviper soldiers are found.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Mount Samara has a ring that was beginning to fade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Mount Samara is a mountain near where Lindon landed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Mount Samara is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Mount Samara is located to the east.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Desperate people are dashing down the slopes of Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — People were crossing the mountains east of Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Mount Samara is a mountain that the Kazan clan reached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Mount Samara is a location where a crowd was pushing up the side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The eastern slopes of Mount Samara are covered in rubble and bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Titan would reach Mount Samara in minutes if it continued walking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Bodies were found in the foothills of Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Titan may have crashed through Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Crowds were seen exiting Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Mount Samara is a location Lindon successfully reached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Mount Samara is surrounded by a halo of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Titan returned its attention to Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin hurtled into the side of Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Dreadgod moved away from Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Humans are fleeing down Mount Samara.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Mount Samara is a location where the Silent Core was kept.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — The eastern chamber is buried beneath Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Mount Samara and the island of the Silent Servants share a white halo of crystallized light madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Forces are creeping closer to Mount Samara.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Mount Samara has a snow-capped passage on its top.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon's portal looked out over the slopes of Mount Samara.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa's house is on Mount Samara.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
